CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2018 Off Calendar

Amended Application By Plaintiff Michael V. Discepola, Jr., For Judgment By Court And All Relief Requested In Verified First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on plaintiff's action for Quiet Title.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Steven J. Kahn, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Michael V. Discepola, Jr., who was placed under oath and testified.
Gayle Picha, a Title Examination Expert and witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by the defaulted defendants Elston Mallory, Leamon King, Jr., Pamela King, Joey King, Gino King, Fernando Brown, Christina Brown or Elizabeth Brown.
Defendants were entered against defendants as follows:

Elston Mallory - November 21, 2016
Leamon King, Jr. - August 10, 2017;
Pamela King - October 23, 2016;
Joey King - February 23, 2016;
Gino King - October 23, 2017;
Fernando Brown - November 21, 2016;
Christina Brown - November 21, 2016; and
Elizabeth Brown - November 21, 2016.
DOES 6 through 150 were dismissed without prejudice today, 12/14/17

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Michale V. Discepola, Jr. and against the Defaulted Defendants, as follows:

Title to the real property located at 82 Carr Street, San Francisco, CA 94124, also know as San Francisco Assessor's Lot 021, Block 5462 ('the Property"), is QUIETED in favor of plaintiff Michael V. Discepola, Jr. as of April 18, 2014, such that Defendants, and each of them, have no right, title, estate, lien or interest in the Property.

Judgment Quieting Title was submitted to and signed by the Court.
